description:
This quiz tests intermediate Regular Expression skills, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, groups, and look-around assertions. It uses an encouraging, playful tone to motivate learners while challenging them with questions ranging from simple string matching to complex pattern validation.
Topics: Basic patterns, Quantifiers, Groups, Look-around assertions, String matching, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers and learners with foundational regex knowledge seeking to reinforce or advance their skills.
